center.name: 淡水沼澤森林
center.summary: 淡水沼澤森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Sunda coucal、Western striolated puffbird、Eastern striolated puffbird等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Though some sources say that the blood-coloured woodpecker is found in "the Guianas", the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has records only in Guyana and Suriname, and not French Guiana. It is a bird of the coastal lowlands, where it inhabits mangroves, swamp forest, and sometimes coffee plantations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges of humid tropical, terra firme, and swamp forests, and also transitional forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits arid to semiarid thorn forest, moister gallery forest, and swamp forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits progressively drier forest types from swamp through várzea and transitional to secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits mangroves, freshwater swamp forests and grasslands near brackish water

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges of humid tropical, terra firme, and swamp forests, and also transitional forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Also found in mature sal forests, swamp forest and mangroves with tall, mature trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is usually non-migratory, but reports of an individual or multiple individuals living in a tract of secondary forest on a former rubber plantation in Kuala Lumpur over a period of three years indicates that the species wanders upon the loss of its usual habitat. The species inhabits several types of forest, including primary forests, selectively logged forests that have regrown, peat swamp forests, high-altitude heath forests, freshwater swamp forests, forest edge, rubber plantations and Falcataria falcata groves

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-whiskered barbet ranges from the Malay Peninsula to Sumatra and Borneo, where it inhabits tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests and montane forest. It has also been sighted in cacao plantation and second growth forests but is rare in evergreen and swamp forests
